first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core justifications are verbatim copies. The differences in the lists of strengths and concerns are minor, synonymous rephrasings (e.g., "explicit" vs. "clear" experience, adding "mentoring" to leadership) that fall within the scope of normal run-to-run variation and do not change the substance or tone of the evaluation.
